title: lithocarpus viridis
intro: Lithocarpus viridis, also known as the evergreen holly or Taiwan holly, is a species of evergreen tree in the beech family Fagaceae, native to East Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce pain, fever, and inflammation. The health benefits of Lithocarpus viridis include its ability to improve cardiovascular health, reduce the risk of cancer, and boost the immune system. Lithocarpus viridis is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and is also used in traditional herbal preparations, such as teas, capsules, and tinctures.
